# @nosafesky/ludemic

> An ECS game framework for Moku — Spark-style public API and memory layout, PixiJS v8 rendering, built on @moku-labs/core, composable with @moku-labs/web, with a first-class MCP plugin exposing the live runtime to agents AND an additive Layer-2 in-browser editor.

`@nosafesky/ludemic` (version 0.3.0, repo NoSafeSky/moku-game) is a typed Entity-Component-System
runtime composed of twenty-seven plugins: sixteen runtime plugins + an eleven-plugin Layer-2
in-browser editor subsystem (registered after `mcp`; two of them — `hierarchy` and `graphics-2d` —
are dual-use runtime capabilities). It is not a game engine UI — it owns the data model (archetype
object-SoA storage), the fixed-timestep frame, and the GPU lifecycle; you write components and
systems in TypeScript. Hot-path frame work bypasses the Moku kernel and is NOT emitted as kernel
events. Systems reach shared services (assets, logging, frame time) through a typed world **resource
registry** — the system signature stays `(world, dt)`. The editor is **poll-on-epoch** and
**pay-for-what-you-use**: a non-editor game never touches it.

## Core Concepts

- **Three-layer Moku model.** `createCoreConfig` (Layer 1: config + events) → `createCore`
  (Layer 2: framework + the 27 built-in plugins) → `createApp({ pluginConfigs })` (Layer 3: your
  app). Consumers import `createApp` / `createPlugin` from `@nosafesky/ludemic` and never import
  `@moku-labs/core` directly. `createApp(...)` returns an App synchronously; `await app.start()`
  boots the Pixi Application and registers DOM listeners. Each plugin's API is reached as
  `app.<plugin>.<method>()` (bracket form for hyphenated names, e.g. `app["editor-bridge"]`).
  **Advanced / headless escape hatches** (also exported): `createCore(carrier, { plugins })` assembles
  a custom core from a plugin subset (carrier type-only); `createCoreConfig(name, { config, plugins })`
  (re-exported from `@moku-labs/core`) builds a bespoke Layer-1 config. `createApp` stays the default.
- **Config composition.** The framework defines no global config fields (`Config = {}`). All
  configuration is per-plugin via `createApp({ pluginConfigs: { <plugin>: { ... } } })`. Core
  plugins `logPlugin` + `envPlugin` from `@moku-labs/common` are registered in `config.ts`, so
  `ctx.log` and `ctx.env` are on every plugin context.
- **ECS data model.** `app.ecs` returns the `World` facade directly (no wrapper). Components are
  registered with `defineComponent(create, opts?)` and are themselves callable: `Position({x,y})`
  produces a `ComponentInit`. `opts.name` makes a component discoverable by name. Storage is
  archetype object-SoA by default with a per-component `"sparse"` opt-out. `Entity` is a generational
  handle (`(generation << 16) | index`), detectably dead via `isAlive`. Typed variadic `query(...)`
  covers arities 1–8. Structural mutations during iteration go through a deferred command buffer
  flushed at each stage boundary. `changeEpoch()` is a monotone per-write counter powering the
  editor's poll-on-epoch reads with no `emit`.
- **ECS introspection facet (read-only).** `liveEntities()`, `entityCount()`, `componentNames()`,
  `componentsOf(entity)`, and `componentByName(name)` expose the live world for tooling (the `mcp`
  plugin, the editor). `componentByName` resolves a named component to its callable token (widened to
  `Component<Record<string, unknown>>`); `undefined` for unknown/anonymous, first-wins on duplicates.
- **World resources (first-class systems access).** A typed singleton registry —
  `defineResource(create?)` mints a `Resource<T>` token; `setResource`/`getResource`/`resource`/
  `hasResource`/`removeResource` read and write. `resource(token)` asserts presence (THROWS if unset
  with no factory); `getResource` returns `T | undefined`. Resource ops are **immediate** — never
  command-buffered, not counted by `maxStructuralOpsWarn`. Well-known resources wired at `app.start()`:
  `Assets` + `GameContext` (context), `Time` (loop).
- **Fixed-timestep loop.** The `loop` plugin owns the frame: a `requestAnimationFrame` loop with a
  fixed-timestep accumulator. Each frame it clamps the real delta, runs `scheduler.tick(fixedDt)`
  zero-or-more times (capped at `maxStepsPerFrame`), then calls `renderer.render()` once. `step()`
  advances one deterministic tick + render and returns a `TimeStepResult` (`{ frame, elapsed, dt }`;
  `{ 0,0,0 }` before start / after stop). Each fixed step it mutates the `Time` resource in place.
- **Scheduler stages.** Five fixed, ordered stages: `input → update → physics → sync → render`.
  Systems are `(world, dt) => void`. The command buffer flushes between stages. `scheduler` forwards
  to `world.addSystem`/`world.tick` and exposes the stage gate (`setActiveStages`/`activeStages`,
  `undefined` = all) that `editor-runtime` drives for edit-vs-play.
- **Polled input + injection.** DOM listeners mutate a live resource; an `"input"`-stage system
  freezes it into an immutable `InputSnapshot` per frame (keys, pointer, and accumulated `wheel`
  delta). `keyDown`/`keyUp`/`keyPress` inject keys with a small alias normalization (`"Space"` →
  `" "`, `"Esc"` → `"Escape"`).
- **MCP runtime exposure.** The `mcp` plugin attaches a Model Context Protocol server (15 tools).
  Transport default is **environment-aware**: `["stdio"]` under Node/Bun, `["inMemory"]` in a browser
  (reach the client via `app.mcp.clientTransport()`); Streamable HTTP is opt-in. Mutating tools return
  MCP `isError` / `{ changed: false }` on unknown names, dead entities, and headless renderers.
- **Headless renderer.** `renderer.headless` (auto-detected when `typeof document === "undefined"`,
  overridable) skips Pixi/GPU in `onStart` while still defining `Transform` and running `sync`, so
  ECS/scene code is identical headless or not.
- **In-browser editor (Layer-2, additive).** Single validated write-authority (`commands` + branded
  `EditorId`), poll-on-epoch reactivity, a two-`createApp` split (the Layer-3 web shell in `editor/`
  consumes exactly one seam, `app["editor-bridge"]`), and pay-for-what-you-use gating. `SceneDocument`
  stays FLAT — the scene graph rides as each entity's ordinary `Node` component.

## Quick Reference

```ts
import { createApp, createPlugin } from "@nosafesky/ludemic";

const app = createApp({
  pluginConfigs: {
    ecs:       { initialCapacity: 1024, maxStructuralOpsWarn: 0 },
    scheduler: { strictStages: true },
    renderer:  { width: 800, height: 600, background: 0x000000, antialias: true, mount: "#game" },
    input:     { target: "window", keyboard: true, pointer: true, wheel: true, preventDefault: false },
    loop:      { fixedDt: 1 / 60, maxFrameDelta: 0.25, maxStepsPerFrame: 5, autoStart: true },
    assets:    { basePath: "assets/", manifest: { ship: "sprites/ship.png" }, throwOnError: true },
    context:   { bindGameContext: true },
    scene:     { despawnOnUnload: true },
    camera:    { editorControls: true },              // opt-in wheel-zoom + drag-pan
    mcp:       { transports: ["stdio"], httpPort: 3333, enableMutations: true }
  }
});
await app.start();          // async — boots Pixi, attaches DOM listeners, binds resources
// ... use the app ...
await app.stop();           // tears down GPU + listeners
```

## Editor extension deltas (additive, non-breaking)

The editor subsystem is supported by additive methods on already-built plugins — a non-editor game
never calls them:

- **ecs** — `changeEpoch()` (per-write counter) + `setActiveStages(stages | undefined)` /
  `activeStages()` (stage gate on `world.tick`).
- **scheduler** — forwards `setActiveStages` / `activeStages` to the world.
- **renderer** — `attachSprite` + `setTextureResolver` / `setWorldTransformResolver` (DI seams for
  graphics-2d / hierarchy) + `setEntityVisible` + `setGridVisible`.
- **input** — a per-frame `wheel` `{ deltaX, deltaY }` on the snapshot (`deltaMode`-normalized).
- **reflection** — schema-only `entity-ref` + `asset-ref` field kinds (8 kinds total).
- **assets** — `entries()` / `manifest()` / `metadata(alias)` (read-only enumeration for the asset browser).
- **camera** — instant `focus` / `zoomAt` / `panBy` + the opt-in `editorControls` input system.
- **tween** / **vfx** / **camera** — `reset()` (clear transient runtime; `editor-runtime.stop()` calls all three on exit-play).

## Plugins

Built/resolved in dependency order (`depends` → resolved with `ctx.require`). Purpose | Tier | key API | events | depends.

### Runtime plugins (16)

- **ecs** — data/runtime core: generational entities, archetype object-SoA storage, typed queries,
  deferred command buffer, read-only introspection, typed world resource registry, change-epoch +
  stage gate. | Complex | `defineComponent`/`spawn`/`query`/`addSystem`/`resource`/`componentByName`/
  `changeEpoch`/`setActiveStages`/`activeStages`/`tick` | events: none | depends: none.
- **scheduler** — ordered stage contract facade over the world; forwards the stage gate. | Standard |
  `addSystem(stage,fn)`/`tick`/`stages`/`setActiveStages`/`activeStages` | events: none | depends: ecs.
- **renderer** — PixiJS v8 backend; defines `Transform`, syncs ECS→views on `sync`, attaches
  primitives + textured sprites, injected texture/world-transform resolver seams, per-view visibility,
  editor grid overlay, first-class `headless` mode. | Complex | `Transform`/`attach`/`attachPrimitive`/
  `attachSprite`/`setTextureResolver`/`setWorldTransformResolver`/`setEntityVisible`/`setGridVisible`/
  `detach`/`render`/`screenshot`/`tree`/`getView`/`getStage`/`getEntityView`/`markDirty` | events: none |
  depends: ecs, scheduler.
- **input** — polled keyboard/pointer/wheel → per-frame `InputSnapshot`; key injection w/ alias
  normalization. | Standard | `snapshot()` → `isDown`/`justPressed`/`justReleased`/`pointer`/`wheel`;
  `keyDown`/`keyUp`/`keyPress` | events: none | depends: scheduler.
- **loop** — fixed-timestep rAF loop driving `scheduler.tick` then `renderer.render`; publishes the
  `Time` resource; `step()` → `TimeStepResult`. | Standard | `start`/`stop`/`step`/`isRunning`/`time` |
  events: none | depends: scheduler, renderer, ecs.
- **assets** — Pixi v8 `Assets` wrapper: load/cache textures + bundles, sprites; editor enumeration. |
  Standard | `load`/`loadBundle`/`sprite`/`get`/`isLoaded`/`entries`/`manifest`/`metadata` |
  events: `assets:loaded` | depends: renderer.
- **context** — binds the well-known `Assets` + `GameContext` world resources at start. | Standard |
  `app.context` → `assets`/`game` | events: none | depends: ecs, assets.
- **scene** — named scene lifecycle with entity-ownership tracking + bundle pre-load. | Standard |
  `define`/`load`/`unload`/`currentScene`/`sceneNames`/`ownedEntities` | events: `scene:loaded` |
  depends: ecs, renderer, assets.
- **mcp** — first-class MCP server over stdio / Streamable HTTP / in-page `inMemory` (env-aware
  default). 15 tools (4 read-only; 11 mutation/play gated by `enableMutations`). | Complex |
  `isRunning`/`httpEndpoint`/`toolNames`/`clientTransport` | events: `game:reset` |
  depends: ecs, scheduler, renderer, input, loop, assets, scene.
- **audio** — native WebAudio SFX + music with a master mute bus; zero deps, headless-safe. | Standard |
  `unlock`/`load`/`play`/`playMusic`/`stopMusic`/`mute`/`unmute`/`setMuted`/`isMuted`/`setVolume`/
  `getVolume` | events: `audio:muteChanged`, `audio:volumeChanged` | depends: none.
- **storage** — namespaced, versioned key/value save persistence behind a pluggable `StorageBackend`
  seam; never throws. | Standard | `get`/`set`/`has`/`remove`/`clear`/`keys`/`isPersistent`/
  `getVersion`/`setBackend` | events: none | depends: none.
- **platform** — portal-SDK adapter layer (CrazyGames/Poki/Newgrounds/none) selected via `ctx.env`;
  capture-then-restore ads; injects a portal `StorageBackend`; persists audio prefs. | Complex |
  `getPortal`/`gameplayStart`/`gameplayStop`/`loadingStart`/`loadingFinished`/`commercialBreak`/
  `rewardedAd`/`isAdPlaying` | events: `platform:ready`, `platform:adStart`, `platform:adEnd` |
  depends: audio, loop, storage.
- **vfx** — game-juice: ECS-native particle emitters + bursts, trauma screen shake, scale-pop,
  hit-flash, floating text, easing curves; `reset()`. | Complex | `createEmitter`/`configureEmitter`/
  `setEmitterEnabled`/`removeEmitter`/`burst`/`shake`/`stopShake`/`pop`/`flash`/`floatText`/`easing`/
  `lerp`/`reset` | events: none | depends: ecs, scheduler, renderer.
- **ui** — PixiJS-native UI: screen stack + declarative widgets (label/button/panel/bar) + HUD +
  pointer/touch hit-testing. | Complex | `pushScreen`/`popScreen`/`replaceScreen`/`clearScreens`/
  `topScreen`/`screenCount`/`addHud`/`removeHud`/`getWidget`/`setText`/`setValue`/`setVisible`/
  `getRoot` | events: none | depends: renderer, scheduler, input.
- **tween** — shared, ECS-agnostic tweening (`to`/`from`/`value`) advanced by one scheduler system
  (pause-safe); `reset()`. | Standard | `to`/`from`/`value`/`killAll`/`count`/`easing`/`lerp`/`reset` |
  events: none | depends: scheduler.
- **camera** — 2D follow/shake/parallax camera over world-space layer containers; animated moves
  delegate to `app.tween`; opt-in editor controls; `reset()`. | Standard | `follow`/`setPosition`/
  `moveTo`/`getPosition`/`setZoom`/`zoomTo`/`getZoom`/`setRotation`/`rotateTo`/`getRotation`/`shake`/
  `focus`/`zoomAt`/`panBy`/`reset`/`world`/`addLayer`/`layer`/`screenToWorld`/`worldToScreen` |
  events: none | depends: renderer, scheduler, tween, input.

### Editor subsystem (Layer-2, additive — 11 plugins, registered after `mcp`, `editor-bridge` last)

- **commands** — the SINGLE validated write-authority; owns the branded, save-durable `EditorId`.
  `Command` = discriminated union addressed by component NAME (spawn/despawn/setField/addComponent/
  removeComponent). | Standard | `apply`/`applyRaw`/`restore`/`resolve`/`editorIdOf`/`setValidator`/
  `count` | events: `commands:restored` | depends: ecs.
- **reflection** — field-schema registry: infer a `FieldDescriptor[]` from a live value or register a
  typed `field.*` schema (registered wins); pure `validate`. 8 field kinds incl. schema-only
  `entity-ref`/`asset-ref`. | Standard | `describe`/`register`/`validate`/`field` | events: none |
  depends: ecs.
- **component-registry** — an enumerable Add-Component catalog: a pure `Map<string,
  ComponentCatalogEntry>` (name/category/defaults/`addable`) domain plugins register into and the
  inspector picker lists. | Standard | `register`/`list`/`byCategory`/`get`/`has` | events: none |
  depends: none.
- **hierarchy** — scene-graph layer: owns one `Node` component (`{ parent, order, name, enabled }`, an
  ordinary component so serialization stays flat) + a `sync`-stage world-transform system; injects
  `renderer.setWorldTransformResolver`. Reparent = a `setField` burst, not a new command kind. |
  Complex | `Node`/`worldOf`/`parentOf`/`childrenOf`/`roots`/`depth`/`canReparent`/
  `computeLocalForPreserveWorld`/`orderBetween` | events: none | depends: ecs, renderer, commands,
  reflection.
- **graphics-2d** — 2D render-component library ("the component IS the renderable"): defines
  `SpriteRenderer` + `Shape`, a `changeEpoch`-gated `sync` reconciler over the renderer's public API,
  and an assets→renderer texture resolver; registers its catalog entries + reflection schemas. |
  Standard | `SpriteRenderer`/`Shape` (component tokens) | events: none | depends: ecs, renderer,
  reflection, component-registry, assets.
- **serialization** — scene (de)serializer keyed by `EditorId`; the `SceneDocument` stays FLAT (the
  `Node` rides as a plain component); v1→v2 identity migration; validates via `reflection`; routes
  loads through `commands.restore`. | Complex | `serialize`/`deserialize`/`save`/`load`/`list`/
  `export`/`import` | events: `serialization:loaded` | depends: ecs, storage, commands, reflection.
- **editor-selection** — viewport picking + selection: `enable`/`disable` flip Pixi `eventMode` on one
  camera pick layer; `pickAt` via a stamped handle; modifier-aware multi-select + a drag marquee
  (`selectInRect`). | Standard | `enable`/`disable`/`select`/`toggle`/`clear`/`selected`/`isSelected`/
  `pickAt`/`selectInRect` | events: `editor-selection:changed` | depends: ecs, renderer, camera, input.
- **editor-history** — undo/redo authority: `applyTracked` wraps `commands.applyRaw` + records a
  bounded field-diff inverse; gesture coalescing; ring buffer capped at `maxDepth`; clears on
  `commands:restored`. | Standard | `applyTracked`/`undo`/`redo`/`canUndo`/`canRedo`/`beginGesture`/
  `endGesture`/`clear` | events: none | depends: commands.
- **editor-gizmos** — direct-manipulation gizmo (a Pixi overlay outside the ECS); anti-drift via
  `camera.screenToWorld` per event; commits `setField` on pointerup through `commands`, coalesced via
  an injected sink. translate/rotate/scale/rect modes (gated by `translateOnly`) + space + pivot. |
  Complex | `enable`/`disable`/`setMode`/`mode`/`setSnap`/`setSpace`/`space`/`setPivot`/`pivot`/
  `setGestureSink` | events: none | depends: renderer, camera, editor-selection, commands.
- **editor-runtime** — edit/play FSM via scheduler stage-gating; `stop()` restores the snapshot then
  `reset()`s tween/vfx/camera. Does NOT gate at boot. | Complex | `enterEdit`/`enterPlay`/`stop`/
  `step`/`mode`/`isPlaying` | events: `editor-runtime:modeChanged` | depends: loop, scheduler,
  serialization, commands, tween, vfx, camera.
- **editor-bridge** — the terminal facade (the Layer-3 web editor's single seam). `snapshot()` is
  immutable, poll-on-epoch, HIERARCHICAL (flat entities carrying `Node`-derived identity +
  `roots`/`children`). Writes forward through the authority; eleven authoring verbs (create/
  createShape/createSprite/delete/duplicate/reparent/reorder/rename/setEnabled/addComponent/
  removeComponent) + `listComponents`; wires `commands.setValidator(reflection.validate)` + the gizmo
  gesture sink at onStart. Registered LAST. | Complex | `snapshot`/`apply`/`setField`/`create`/
  `createShape`/`createSprite`/`delete`/`duplicate`/`reparent`/`reorder`/`rename`/`setEnabled`/
  `addComponent`/`removeComponent`/`listComponents`/`select`/`clearSelection`/`undo`/`redo`/`play`/
  `stop`/`step`/`save`/`load`/`describe` | events: none | depends: ecs, reflection, commands,
  hierarchy, component-registry, editor-selection, editor-gizmos, editor-history, editor-runtime,
  serialization, mcp.

## Events

The catalog is intentionally tiny — per-frame work is on the hot path, off the event bus. Subscribe
from a consumer plugin's `hooks` map; the editor is otherwise POLL-ON-EPOCH (panels read
`app["editor-bridge"].snapshot()` and re-render only when `epoch` advances).

- `assets:loaded` — `{ alias: string; kind: "asset" | "bundle" }` — after `load()`/`loadBundle()`. (framework Events)
- `scene:loaded` — `{ name: string }` — after a scene's `setup` completes during `load()`. (framework Events)
- `game:reset` — `{ reason: "mcp" }` — after the mcp `game:reset` tool despawns MCP-tracked entities + unloads the scene. (mcp)
- `audio:muteChanged` — `{ muted: boolean }` — after `mute()`/`unmute()`/`setMuted()` changes the mute state. (audio)
- `audio:volumeChanged` — `{ channel: "master" | "sfx" | "music"; value: number }` — after `setVolume()`. (audio)
- `platform:ready` — `{ portal: Portal }` — once the active portal adapter is initialised + loading finished. (platform)
- `platform:adStart` — `{ type: "interstitial" | "rewarded" }` — when an ad begins (loop paused + audio muted). (platform)
- `platform:adEnd` — `{ type: "interstitial" | "rewarded"; rewarded?: boolean }` — when an ad ends (loop + audio restored). (platform)
- `commands:restored` — `{ source: "reload" | "exit-play" }` — after a non-undoable `commands.restore()` reseeds the world + EditorId map. (commands)
- `serialization:loaded` — `{ name: string; entityCount: number }` — after `deserialize()`/`load()` and the named scene is live. (serialization)
- `editor-selection:changed` — `{ selected: readonly Entity[] }` — after the editor selection set changes. (editor-selection)
- `editor-runtime:modeChanged` — `{ mode: "edit" | "play" }` — after an edit↔play flip. (editor-runtime)

`assets:loaded`/`scene:loaded` are declared in `src/config.ts` (framework `Events`); the rest are
plugin-level events declared + emitted by their plugins. `ecs`, `scheduler`, `renderer`, `input`,
`loop`, `context`, `vfx`, `ui`, `tween`, `camera`, `component-registry`, `hierarchy`, `graphics-2d`,
`reflection`, `editor-history`, `editor-gizmos`, and `editor-bridge` emit no events.

## File Structure

```
game/
├── src/
│   ├── config.ts            # Layer 1: createCoreConfig, Config = {}, Events, createPlugin/createCore
│   ├── index.ts             # Layer 2: createCore assembles the 27 plugins (16 runtime + 11 editor); exports createApp/createPlugin (+ createCore/createCoreConfig + field)
│   └── plugins/             # one dir per plugin (index.ts, types.ts, api.ts, lifecycle.ts, README.md, __tests__/)
├── editor/                  # Layer-3 @moku-labs/web (Preact) editor app consuming app["editor-bridge"]
├── tests/                   # framework-level unit + integration tests
├── .planning/               # design specs (intent)
├── README.md
├── llms.txt
└── llms-full.txt
```

## Requirements

- Node `>= 24`, Bun `>= 1.3.14` (use bun exclusively). TypeScript strict +
  `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` + `noUncheckedIndexedAccess`.
- Dependencies: `@moku-labs/core` (1.5.0), `@moku-labs/common` (0.3.0), `pixi.js@^8`. Composable with
  `@moku-labs/web`. mcp adds `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk`, `hono`, `zod`.

## Scripts

`bun run build` (tsdown) · `bun run typecheck` (tsc --noEmit) · `bun run lint` (biome + eslint) ·
`bun run lint:fix` · `bun run format` · `bun run test` (vitest run) · `bun run test:unit` ·
`bun run test:integration` · `bun run test:coverage`.
